name: sleevy
description: Add, view, and delete items from Sleevy

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: sleeve-it
commands.title: Sleeve It
commands.description: Save URL from clipboard to your Sleevy

title: Sleevy - Manage Your Bookmarks
author: onnokh

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: The base URL for the Sleevy API

preferences.name: webUrl
preferences.title: Web URL
preferences.description: The base URL for the Sleevy web app (used during Connect). Leave empty to derive from API URL.

preferences.name: sourceName
preferences.title: Source Name
preferences.description: A name for this device (e.g. Work Laptop). Defaults to your computer name if empty.
